definition: A contemplative recollection built around upasama-side peace or quieting language, often linked to nibbāna.
notes: Use this record when the text explicitly names recollection of peace. The compound inherits the distinction between upasama and santi and should not be flattened into mere relaxation-language.

example_phrases.notes: Governed contemplative expression linked to consummation-side peace without collapsing into sentimental calm.
